title: cyperus amabilis var. oligostachyus
intro: Cyperus amabilis var. oligostachyus, also known as the few-spiked flatsedge, is a variety of the Cyperus amabilis plant, a type of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Cyperus amabilis var. oligostachyus include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water.
